stemHtml: GPS uses two frequencies, L1 and L2. Choose the correct statement from these options.

options.a: L1 is required for the standard positioning and timing service, SPS.
options.b: L1 and L2 are both required for the Standard Positioning Service (SPS).
options.c: L2 is required for civilian users in order to achieve basic accuracy.
options.d: The L2C part of L2 is required to achieve the required accuracy.
